features.name: Menu bar tray icon + window toggle
features.notes: Tray icon, click to show/hide, 300ms debounce fix

features.name: Embed OpenClaw Control UI via iframe
features.notes: CSP header stripping in Electron, loading/error states

features.name: Settings panel (Gateway URL + auth)
features.notes: URL, token, password fields, theme selector, persistent to ~/.clawbar/settings.json

features.name: Light/dark theme with system follow
features.notes: CSS variables, data-theme attribute, nativeTheme listener

features.name: End-to-end test with real OpenClaw instance
features.notes: Need user's OpenClaw running. Verify iframe loads chat, send message, receive reply

features.name: Window position persistence
features.notes: Remember drag position, restore on next show. Reset if off-screen.

features.name: Remove unused dependencies (react-markdown, remark-gfm)
features.notes: No longer needed after WebView refactor
